MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT

APPEARANCES: Roberto Ripamonti, Esq. of Tsao-Wu, Chow & Yee LLP 777-1688 for pltf & opposing party; Sammy Obaid, Deputy Atty, California Deparment of Transportation 904-5700 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as courtesy copies of the moving papers provided. Upon further review, the Court sustained the demurrer without leave to amend as to the 1st and 2nd causes of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
